top_signals.title: Iran Rushes to Woo Asia’s Top Oil Importers After US Waiver
top_signals.summary: Iran is racing to court some of Asia’s largest oil buyers as a 60-day US sanctions waiver takes effect, a temporary lifeline that should allow Tehran to resume exports and begin clearing a backlog of cargoes on the water, even as peace talks continue.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Police raid malware network tied to Russia's Evil Corp hacker group
top_signals.summary: An international operation targeted the SocGholish botnet, which has been linked to the Russia-based cybercrime group Evil Corp.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Companies are demanding states cut red tape. Data center-wary voters may think differently
top_signals.summary: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro touted a $20 billion economic development deal last June, the state's largest ever. It's caused Shapiro no shortage of grief.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX stock tanks 16%, extending slump following post-IPO rally
top_signals.summary: A rally following the company's record breaking IPO on June 12 has cooled, with stock dropping the past three days of trading.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Meeting of the Court of Directors held on 23 April 2026
top_signals.summary: The Bank's Court of Directors acts as a unitary board, setting the organisation's strategy and budget and taking key decisions on resourcing and appointments. Required to meet a minimum seven times per year, it has five executive members from the Bank and up to nine non-executive members.

top_signals.title: Modernising money and markets − speech by Sarah Breeden
Korean Stocks Tumble 10% as Extreme Volatility Rattles Investors
top_signals.summary: South Korean stocks tumbled from a record high as investors sold off chip heavyweights, delivering another outsized swing that has become a feature of the world’s best‑performing market this year.
